latin: Ego sum Undecima. puella capillis brevibus fugiebat. potestates mirabiles habebat — res mente movere poterat. sed nomen solum numerus erat.

questions.prompt: What is special about the girl?
questions.target: She can move things with her mind
choices: She can move things with her mind

translation: I am Eleven. A girl with short hair was running away. She had wondrous powers — she could move things with her mind. But her name was only a number.
